# Diners Club Premium Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![Diners Club Premium Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/diners-club-premium-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Diners Club Premium Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you?

## Card Benefits and Features
Reward Point Benefits
  * 2,500 Reward points on card activation.
  * Earn 4 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent.
  * Lowest markup on foreign currency transactions of just 2%.


View More 
![Diners Club Premium Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Enjoy a 24x7 concierge service for reservations for travel needs. Call 1800 209 4006 (Toll Free)
  * Lowest markup on foreign currency transactions of just 2%.
  * Convert reward points to miles on Jet Airways, Air India and Singapore Airlines (1 reward point = 0.50 air mile)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-premium-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Premium Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹1 crore.
  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation up to ₹25 lakh.
  * Travel insurance cover: Up to ₹50,000 for baggage delay/loss.
  * Credit liability cover of up to ₹9 lakh.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-premium-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Premium Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Fees and Charges
  3. ### Card Control and Redemption
  4. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees and Charges 
Diners Club Premium Credit Card Fees & Charges
  * **Joining/renewal membership fee:** ₹2,500 plus applicable taxes.
  * **Cash Advance fee:** 2.5% fee, minimum ₹500, on all cash withdrawals.
  * **Interest:** 3.6% per month on outstanding amounts past the due date.
  * **Renewal fee waiver** on spending ₹3 lakh or more in a year before renewal date. 


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-premium-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of the fees and charges of Diners Club Premium Credit Card.
[Check Now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-premium-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Control and Redemption 
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/diners) or NetBanking.
  * Reward points can be redeemed for each of the following categories:

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹0.50  |  
| AirMiles conversion  | 0.50 AirMile  |  
| Products Catalogue and vouchers  | up to ₹0.35  |  
| Cashback  | up to ₹0.20  |  
  * Redeem up to 70% of booking value with reward points for flights and hotels.  
  

    * *Balance to be paid by Credit Card.
  * Reward points earned are capped at 50,000 in a statement cycle.


![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is a Diners Club Premium Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank Diners Club Premium Credit Card is a premium offering that provides exceptional rewards, benefits, and privileges, catering to the discerning needs of individuals.
###  What is the Diners Club Premium Credit Card limit?
The credit limit on the HDFC Bank **Diners Club Premium Credit Card** is determined based on various factors, including income, credit history, and HDFC Bank's internal policies.
###  How to apply for a Diners Club Premium Credit Card? 
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank World MasterCard Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other Credit Cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
